name: TC-SF-001 — GET /api/v1/fetch/status: Returns 200 with service status object
description:
**What this test does:**
Calls GET /spr-fetcher/api/v1/fetch/status with a valid Bearer token and verifies the response is HTTP 200 with a non-empty JSON object.

**Why it matters:** This is the primary health/status endpoint for the SPR Fetcher. If it returns an error, operators cannot determine whether the service is running, what configuration it is using, or whether it can successfully reach the KCB API.
descriptionHtml:
What this test does:
Calls GET /spr-fetcher/api/v1/fetch/status with a valid Bearer token and verifies the response is HTTP 200 with a non-empty JSON object.

Why it matters: This is the primary health/status endpoint for the SPR Fetcher. If it returns an error, operators cannot determine whether the service is running, what configuration it is using, or whether it can successfully reach the KCB API.
